title: clematis biflora
intro: Clematis biflora, a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Clematis biflora is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
